title: Command
description: A command dispatched to a Formant-connected device.

organizationId.description: UUID of the organization that owns the device.

commandTemplateId.description: UUID of the command template this command is based on.

command.description: Command string identifier matching a registered command template.

CommandParameter.title: CommandParameter
CommandParameter.description: Optional parameter value and scrubber time attached to a command.

value.description: String value of the command parameter.

scrubberTime.description: Timestamp used for timeline scrubbing context.
